title: Brewed Awagening
text:
About This Template

Brewed Awakening is a fully responsive, single-page artisan café website template built entirely with vanilla HTML, CSS, and JavaScript — no frameworks, no build tools, no dependencies beyond Google Fonts. It is designed to be dropped into any static host or edited live in Klar's visual CMS.

Design Philosophy

The template pairs a warm, coffee-inspired color palette with a Playfair Display + Poppins typography duo to evoke the feel of a cozy, modern coffeehouse. Every color is driven by CSS custom properties, so the entire site re-themes instantly when the user toggles between light and dark mode.

Key Features

  • Light & Dark Mode — A one-click theme toggle in the navbar persists the visitor's preference via localStorage. All colors, backgrounds, shadows, and borders are defined as CSS variables, so the switch is instant and flicker-free.
  • Sticky Glassmorphism Navbar — Transparent on load, compacts and gains a shadow once the user scrolls past 50px. On mobile it collapses into a full-screen overlay menu with an animated hamburger icon.
  • Full-Viewport Hero — A layered hero section with a background image, gradient overlay, badge label, dual call-to-action buttons, and an animated scroll indicator that gently bounces to invite the user downward.
  • About Section with Layered Imagery — A two-column layout featuring a main image, an accent image, and a floating glassmorphism stats badge, paired with a features grid of eco-friendly, latte art, fresh pastries, and sustainability highlights.
  • Filterable Menu Grid — Menu cards organized by category (Coffee, Pastries, Specials) with a filter button bar. Each card shows an icon, name, price, description, and tags. Filtering animates cards in and out gracefully.
  • Gallery with Masonry Layout — A responsive grid where the first image spans two columns and two rows, creating a focal point. Hovering reveals a caption overlay with a subtle zoom effect.
  • Testimonials — Three glassmorphism cards with star ratings, italicized quote text featuring a decorative opening quotation mark, and author avatars with names and roles.
  • Contact Section — A validated contact form (name, email, subject, message) with real-time blur validation, inline error messages, and a success confirmation. The opposite column lists address, phone, email, a map placeholder, and opening hours.
  • Footer — A four-column footer with brand description, social links (Instagram, Facebook, Twitter/X, TikTok) as inline SVG icons, quick-link columns, a legal bar, and a copyright line.
  • Scroll-Reveal Animations — An IntersectionObserver fades and lifts elements into view as the user scrolls, with staggered delay classes for a cascading effect.
  • Active Nav Highlighting — The navbar link corresponding to the section currently in view is automatically highlighted in the accent color.
  • Parallax Background — Three blurred, floating gradient blobs drift behind the content and shift subtly on scroll, adding atmosphere without distracting from the content.

Responsive Breakpoints

The template is mobile-first and tested at three breakpoints:

  • 1024px — Tablet landscape: the gallery and footer reflow.
  • 768px — Tablet portrait: the nav switches to hamburger, grids collapse to single columns, and sections tighten padding.
  • 480px — Phone: the hero title scales down, gallery becomes single-column, and menu cards center-align.
name: klar-brewed-awakening
